description: TEP M*/M_dyn correction magnitude (real UNCOVER data)

methodology.comparison_type: Real-data-derived mass correction compared against published external kinematic regime tension
methodology.supplementary_object_level_source: Esdaile et al. 2021 massive quiescent kinematics (z=3.2-3.7)

kinematic_table.sample_name: Esdaile et al. 2021 massive quiescent kinematics (z=3.2-3.7)

metadata.sample_name: Esdaile et al. 2021 massive quiescent kinematics (z=3.2-3.7)
metadata.selection_notes: Curated object-level direct kinematic table for step_117. This sample is used to activate reproducible object-level ingestion, quantify direct M*/Mdyn resolution, and provide the provisional downstream beta propagation anchor, while the matched regime-level RUBIES-like fallback remains the authoritative L4 regime summary because this object-level anchor is at z=3.2-3.7 rather than the higher-z live L4 regime.

supplementary_direct_object_level.description: TEP M*/M_dyn correction using direct object-level kinematic measurements

methodology.comparison_type: Observed M* vs direct M_dyn per object
